query: SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = DATABASE();
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 21BFt5o7WZAgbzs.root --database 2zCg9SPoUukX8rXL62G4yf --execute SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = DATABASE();
